parameters.query: SELECT * FROM external WHERE source_info = 'nova_era' and searched_hash = '{{ $('Crypto Md5 Converter').item.json.searched_hash }}' and updated_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL {{ $('Credenciais').first().json.retencao }} DAY);
SELECT payload FROM external WHERE source_info = 'nova_era' and searched = '{{ $('Data For Search').first().json.searched }}'
